positive: A minimalist, stylish line-art illustration of a stylized mountain range viewed from a panoramic viewpoint, integrated with abstract celestial elements like crescent moons and geometric constellations. The scene should utilize a limited color palette of deep indigo, dusty sage green, and off-white lines, providing high contrast against a solid background. The composition must be centrally focused and balanced, perfect for screen printing on apparel. The style should be reminiscent of modern folk art, emphasizing clean silhouettes and crisp linework. The mountain peaks should be sharp and iconic, and the stars should appear as delicate, perfect dots. Clean vector aesthetic.
